title: Here's What Key Metrics Tell Us About Pacific Premier Bancorp (PPBI) Q1 Earnings
author: Zacks Equity Research
description: While the top- and bottom-line numbers for Pacific Premier Bancorp (PPBI) give a sense of how the business performed in the quarter ended March 2024, it could be worth looking at how some of its key metrics compare to Wall Street estimates and year-ago values.

title: Pacific Premier Bancorp (PPBI) Surpasses Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
author: Zacks Equity Research
description: Pacific Premier Bancorp (PPBI) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 2.08% and 2.35%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2024. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
